name: Cash, John Carter
source_notes:
Sy Scholfield cites hospital baby bracelet quoted in news report, "Baby boy--By Cash and Carter" by Jack Hurst, The Tennessean (Nashville, Tennessee), 4 March 1970, pages 1+7: "At 3 p.m. yesterday he thrust his arms wide ... On his small arm was a plain plastic bracelet inscribed: 'Boy--Cash--12:43.' ... They [had] reached Madison Hospital [yesterday] at 5 a.m."

Scholfield quotes daughter Grace's data from her mother's Instagram post: "My husband John Carter and I are proud to announce the birth of our daughter, Grace June Cash. She was born on September 11th, 2017 at 5:44 pm" [https://www.instagram.com/p/BZLuepbnroQ]; also quoted online: "Grace June Cash, according to an Instagram post from Ana Cristina Cash, was born on Sept. 11, at 5:44PM" [https://theboot.com/john-carter-cash-ana-cristina-cash-baby-girl/].

Scholfield quotes son James's data from his mother's Instagram post: "My husband @johncartercash and I are proud and delighted to announce the birth of our son: James Kristoffer Cash 07/16/2021 9:13 AM 6 Pounds 13 Oz" [https://www.instagram.com/p/CRbkjHTh-A7/] and his father's Instagram post: "#jameskristoffercash born July 16, 2021 at 9:13am. Mother @anacristinacash is doing well. #jamescash is a #hungryfella !! Ana Cristina and I are honored to share the announcement of his birth with the world!" [https://www.instagram.com/p/CRbhUpzhS-N/], [https://theboot.com/john-carter-cash-ana-cristina-cash-baby-boy-son/].
categories: Vocation : Entertain/Music : Vocalist/ Pop, Rock, etc.
